treatment_information.specific_treatment: Anterior cervical discectomy and fusion at C7-T1
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Included anterior spacer, anterior instrumentation, autograft, and allograft
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was intubated prior to MRI due to agitation; appeared neuro intact in ED

treatment_timeline.event: Patient suffered a fall in group home
Patient was transferred to OSH for further management
Surgery performed: Anterior cervical discectomy and fusion at C7-T1

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory - requires assistance or aid (walker or cane)
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Mental Status: Clear and coherent. Level of Consciousness: Alert and interactive.
